topStories.title: Supreme Court gives Centre four-week leeway to respond to petition on airfare hike, says govt. handling ‘bigger problems now’
topStories.description: Petitioner had sought steps to address fare fluctuation, fare transparency, and continuity of essential air services

topStories.title: What Trump said about Iran after postponing military strikes
topStories.description: After announcing the US will postpone strikes on Iran’s power plants, Donald Trump said Iran called him to make a deal.

topStories.title: Anil Ambani bank fraud case: Supreme Court says CBI, ED showed reluctance
topStories.description: Solicitor General Tushar Mehta promises to personally convey the court’s message to ED and CBI directors in “harsher terms”

topStories.title: US Comedian Bill Cosby Ordered To Pay $19 Million Over Sex Abuse Claim
topStories.description: The jury took three days to deliver its verdict, ordering Bill Cosby to pay $19.3 million, a figure that could increase if they add punitive damages.

topStories.title: Tehran residents express distrust over Trump’s war diplomacy
topStories.description: “If we trust him, we lose.”

dailyNews.title: Air Street becomes one of the largest solo VCs in Europe with $232M fund
dailyNews.description: London’s Air Street Capital has raised a large Fund III with eyes locked on backing early-stage European and North American AI companies.

dailyNews.title: Have Israel, the US and Iran violated international law?
dailyNews.description: Civilian targets have been struck by all three warring parties.

dailyNews.title: ICE agents deploy to major US airports as security queues stretch for hours
dailyNews.description: Hundreds of ICE agents have been deployed to 14 airports, in cities including New York, Atlanta and Houston.

dailyNews.title: Iranian officials dismiss claims of US talks
dailyNews.description: Senior Iranian officials deny that Iran held talks with the US

dailyNews.title: Netanyahu Says Spoke With Trump, Vows To Protect Israel's Interests
dailyNews.description: Iran War: Benjamin Netanyahu said that Israel will continue to strike both in Iran and in Lebanon.

dailyNews.title: Moment missile strikes shortly after Israeli president’s visit
dailyNews.description: Israel's president was forced to take cover as a missile struck nearby shortly after he gave a press conference.

dailyNews.title: Bypoll: BJP candidates richer than Congress candidates
dailyNews.description: The BJP candidates are richer compared to the Congress candidates as per their affidavits filed along with their nomination papers in the byelections to Bagalkot and Davangere South Assembly constituencies.

dailyNews.title: ‘Stop, stop, stop’: Moment Air Canada plane crashes into truck
dailyNews.description: CCTV video captured the moment an Air Canada plane collided with a fire truck at New York’s LaGuardia Airport.

dailyNews.title: Bipartisan bill seeks to ban sports betting on Kalshi and Polymarket
dailyNews.description: Since FanDuel and DraftKings are subject to state-by-state gambling laws, rather than federal law, they would not be impacted by the bill.

dailyNews.title: A pharmacist and a homesick lifestyle blogger: The 'alarming' civilian cost of war in Iran
dailyNews.description: The toll on civilians is mounting fast as the US-Israeli war on Iran continues.

dailyNews.title: "I Messed Up": Moment Plane Crashed Into Truck On New York Runway
dailyNews.description: A pilot and a co-pilot were killed after an Air Canada Express passenger plane collided with a fire truck on a LaGuardia Airport runway late Sunday.

dailyNews.title: Iran denies any talks with US after Trump claims ‘productive’ discussions
dailyNews.description: Iran parliament speaker says US president using idea of talks to 'escape quagmire in which US and Israel are trapped'.

dailyNews.title: DoorDash introduces relief payments for drivers as the Iran-US war drives up gas prices
dailyNews.description: Gas is one of the largest expenses for delivery drivers. With prices continuing to surge, DoorDash is offering a lifeline to Dashers with a new relief program.

dailyNews.title: Trump can declare victory in Iran – and he should
dailyNews.description: The US president has proven that hitting hard and fast rather than engaging in endless negotiations guarantees victory.

dailyNews.title: 'Like the plane got cut in half': Eyewitnesses describe chaos of LaGuardia crash
dailyNews.description: Eyewitnesses have described the moment Air Canada flight AC8646 crashed into a fire truck on the runway of New York's LaGuardia airport.

dailyNews.title: Supreme Court unhappy over CBI, ED ‘reluctance’ against Anil Ambani firms, calls for ‘fair, dispassionate’ investigation
dailyNews.description: The Supreme Court today called on the CBI and ED to conduct a “fair, dispassionate, transparent, and time-bound” investigation into a banking fraud linked to the Anil Dhirubhai Ambani Group. The apex court also directed concerned financial institutions to “render full cooperation”.

dailyNews.title: EAM Jaishankar speaks with US' secretary Rubio on West Asia conflict
dailyNews.description: Jaishankar and Rubio discussed West Asia conflict and its impact on the global economy, with a focus on energy security concerns

dailyNews.title: JFK, Atlanta airports issue travel advisory amid TSA worker shortage; passengers can expect five-hour wait time
dailyNews.description: Two of the US' busiest airports issued a travel advisory on Monday, warning passengers that the wait time could be at least five hours as TSA workers resign amid a partial DHS shutdown. Atlanta Airport, the world's busiest, saw wait time stretching beyond three hours over the weekend.

topStories.title: Netanyahu Says Spoke With Trump, Vows To Protect Israel's Interests
topStories.description: Iran War: Benjamin Netanyahu said that Israel will continue to strike both in Iran and in Lebanon.

topStories.title: Moment missile strikes shortly after Israeli president’s visit
topStories.description: Israel's president was forced to take cover as a missile struck nearby shortly after he gave a press conference.

topStories.description: The US president has proven that hitting hard and fast rather than engaging in endless negotiations guarantees victory.

topStories.title: How Israel is reacting to Trump’s  ‘de-escalation’ with Iran
topStories.description: There is expected to be pushback from Israel following President Donald Trump’s move towards de-escalation with Iran.

topStories.title: Joe Kent praises Trump, says ‘President working to get peace with Iran, Israel will be against it, but…’
topStories.description: Kent, who is also former counterterrorism official in the Trump administration, said the President was working to make peace with Iran, while once again acknowledging resistance from Israel.

topStories.title: Virginia Dem admits redistricting push aims to 'stop Trump', not about 'fairness'
topStories.description: Virginia Rep. Donald Beyer says the redistricting push is about stopping Trump and taking back the House, not restoring fairness for Virginia voters.

topStories.title: Top Dems assert there's risk ICE agents could ‘kill’ travelers under Trump airport plan
topStories.description: Rep. Hakeem Jeffries claims deploying ICE agents to airports could kill passengers, calling them untrained as TSA shortages cause long security lines.

topStories.title: Former Yale hockey coach alleges 'toxic environment' under athletic director Victoria Chun, letter shows
topStories.description: Yale athletic director Victoria Chun is accused of creating a "toxic environment" and silencing dissent in a letter former hockey coach Keith Allain sent to Yale's president.

topStories.title: Trump Delays Energy Strikes, but Iran’s Infrastructure Is Already Battered
topStories.description: U.S. and Israeli attacks on power plants and other civilian infrastructure risk escalating the conflict across the region, and angering Iranians who oppose the government.

dailyNews.title: Trump Delays Energy Strikes, but Iran’s Infrastructure Is Already Battered
dailyNews.description: U.S. and Israeli attacks on power plants and other civilian infrastructure risk escalating the conflict across the region, and angering Iranians who oppose the government.

dailyNews.title: Trump Administration to Pay $1 Billion to Energy Giant to Cancel Wind Farms
dailyNews.description: In exchange, the French company TotalEnergies would invest in oil and natural gas projects in Texas and elsewhere.

dailyNews.title: Trump Administration Targets Harvard With Two New Investigations
dailyNews.description: The inquiries target antisemitism and admissions policies. The university called it retaliation for refusing to give in to the administration’s demands.

dailyNews.title: Trump Visits Elvis’s Graceland Estate
dailyNews.description: Amid a war with Iran, rising gas prices and a government shutdown, the president detoured on a trip to Memphis to visit the king of rock’s mansion.

dailyNews.title: ICE agents spotted in airports across the country in plan to assist TSA
dailyNews.description: ICE agents have been spotted in airports across the nation after President Donald Trump announced they would be deployed to assist TSA. NBC News’ Jesse Kirsch reports on the morning rush at Atlanta’s Hartsfield-Jackson International Airport and how ICE agents are helping.

dailyNews.title: Trump says Israel would be 'very happy' if U.S. reaches ceasefire deal with Iran
dailyNews.description: President Trump told reporters he believed Israel would abide by a ceasefire agreement negotiated between the United States and Iran. The president also discussed the decision to hold off on strikes on a power plant as talks between the nations were ongoing.

dailyNews.title: Trump puts Republicans in a bind on the DHS shutdown: From the Politics Desk
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump rejected an off-ramp to the DHS shutdown and instead called on congressional Republicans to refuse any deal with Democrats unless they agree to pass the SAVE America Act.

dailyNews.title: Conservation groups sue to block Trump efforts to 'hastily gut' the Kennedy Center
dailyNews.description: Several conservation groups sued Monday to block the planned massive renovations at the Kennedy Center for the Performing Arts, arguing the Trump administration plans to "hastily gut" the center without regard to its history or statutory guardrails

dailyNews.title: Trump rejects off-ramp to fund DHS as airport delays worsen
dailyNews.description: Senate Majority Leader John Thune discussed an off-ramp with President Donald Trump to reopen TSA and end long lines at airports, funding DHS but not ICE. Trump rejected it.

dailyNews.title: Rubio to testify in trial of former roommate accused of secretly lobbying for Venezuela
dailyNews.description: The federal trial of a former Miami congressman accused of secretly lobbying for Venezuela’s government during the first Trump administration begins Monday with Secretary of State Marco Rubio set to testify over his interactions with his old friend.

dailyNews.title: Iranian official says U.S. sent message via mediators as Trump says deal is possible
dailyNews.description: As Iran threatens to mine the entire Persian Gulf, President Trump says his deadline for the Strait of Hormuz to reopen is postponed amid negotiations with Tehran.

dailyNews.title: State of play around Strait of Hormuz as Trump postpones deadline
dailyNews.description: President Trump on Monday postponed his deadline for Iran to reopen the Strait of Hormuz. Mr. Trump had threatened strikes against Iranian power plants if the strait wasn't opened by Monday night. CBS News national security analyst Aaron MacLean joins with more.

dailyNews.title: Trump administration says it is ready to deport Abrego Garcia to Liberia
dailyNews.description: The Trump administration has asked a federal judge to dissolve her order preventing ICE from deporting Kilmar Abrego Garcia to Liberia.
